user.title: BOM realtime weather station
user.description: Create realtime weather and sensor entities from the Bureau of Meteorology 72-hour station JSON feed. Enter the station WMO number from the BOM observations table for your state/territory.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to fetch observation data for this BOM station. Check the selected state/territory feed and WMO number.

abort.already_configured: This BOM station is already configured.
